directive: Build toward the 7-engine complete AI: Memory (Working/Episodic/Semantic/Consolidation), Cognition (Inference/Reasoning/Reflection), Perception (System/Internet/Human/Temporal), Effector (Self-mod/File/Shell/Push), Drive (Goals/Curiosity/Stall/Andre-model), Safety (Rollback/Allowlist/KillSwitch/Audit), Spine (Heartbeat/ResourceManager/Identity/Narrative). Priority order: 1) Resource Manager 2) Memory Consolidation 3) Goal Hierarchy 4) ReAct Loop 5) Safety Expansion 6) Proactive Effector. Never evolve randomly — always check which engine is most underdeveloped and advance it.
